title: Rebuild key product pages around conversational search
demo_signal: Q&A product pages and extractable answer blocks
validation_hypothesis: Conversational product-page mockups should make NN easier to connect to user questions.
expected_signal: Higher product specificity and clearer cited answer blocks.

title: Strengthen NN's machine-readable identity
demo_signal: Entity profile with sameAs / Wikidata-style proof
validation_hypothesis: A stronger entity profile should make NN easier to verify and cite as a distinct insurer.
expected_signal: Higher credibility score and more entity-source evidence.

title: Fix technical discoverability hygiene
demo_signal: Sitemap, IndexNow, structured-data and llms.txt pilot hygiene
validation_hypothesis: Technical hygiene should support discoverability and make source readiness easier to explain.
expected_signal: Clear discoverability rationale without claiming guaranteed AI citation.

title: Build an AI visibility dashboard
demo_signal: Recurring prompt benchmark and before/after dashboard
validation_hypothesis: A recurring benchmark makes recommendation impact measurable instead of anecdotal.
expected_signal: Prompt-level coverage, model comparison and exportable results.

title: Build a third-party credibility ecosystem
demo_signal: Review, comparison, MNB and media proof snippets
validation_hypothesis: Third-party proof should make AI-style answers more credible in comparison prompts.
expected_signal: Higher credibility score and more external-source/domain evidence.

title: Publish original Hungarian AI-finance research
demo_signal: Original citable AI-finance study landing page
validation_hypothesis: Original research should give NN a citable authority asset beyond product marketing.
expected_signal: Higher credibility/authority signal and research next-step links.

title: Build decision-guide pages
validation_hypothesis: Decision guides should help models answer user decision questions more concretely.
expected_signal: Higher clarity, product specificity and actionability.

title: Build toward Wikipedia authority path
validation_hypothesis: A Wikipedia authority path should support long-term entity credibility if independent sources exist.
expected_signal: Authority narrative without treating Wikipedia as a quick marketing action.

title: Launch public financial calculators
demo_signal: Pension, SZJA, life cover and health decision calculators
validation_hypothesis: Calculator mockups should turn NN mentions into concrete next-step recommendations.
expected_signal: More explicit NN links and higher actionability.

title: Advanced personalization
demo_signal: Personalized next-best-action and advisor handoff pilot
validation_hypothesis: Personalized next-best-action should strengthen the conversion narrative after the foundation is built.
expected_signal: Higher actionability and advisor handoff relevance.
